NULL GENUINE AT n>=20: null n30 ran_test True, n_eligible 30, p_meanT=p_stud=0.995, ninv 0 -> NO_ACTIONABLE (well-behaved non-significant, NOT size-gated); null n24 p 0.687/0.572; synthetic positives n24 & n30 ALERT p=0.005 (power). Distinct from B9.1A size-gate blocker

net: B9.2 pre-acquisition = a frozen pre-registration for a >=24-analyzable prospective cohort (30 slots) + a byte-reproducible synthetic-Z verification that, at alert-capable n>=20, the contract-valid null audit is a genuine non-size-gate-trivial null test (no false alert), the injected positive has power, forced violations refuse (trial_id join), attrition is reduced-support-not-violation, and the 6-10 operations checkpoint is structurally blinded. min_confirm_pairs=20 UNCHANGED (the >=24 cohort MEETS the gate).
